اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ، وَصَلِّ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ، وَأَحْصَاهُ كِتَابُكَ، وَشَهِدَتْ بِهِ مَلَائِكَتُكَ، صَلَاةً دَائِمَةً تَدُومُ بِدَوَامِ مُلْكِ اللَّهِ.

اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَسْمَائِكَ الْحُسْنَى كُلِّهَا، أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ بِكُلِّ صَلَاةٍ صُلِّيَتْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَوَّلِ الدَّهْرِ إِلَى آخِرِهِ، وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ صَلَاتَنَا هَذِهِ كَصَلَوَاتِهِمْ، وَأَجْرَنَا كَأُجُورِهِمْ، وَأَنْ تُضَاعِفَ ذَلِكَ لَنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا أَكْرَمَ الْأَكْرَمِينَ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ الزَّاهِدِ، رَسُولِ الْمَلِكِ الصَّمَدِ الْوَاحِدِ، صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَاةً دَائِمَةً إِلَى مُنْتَهَى الْأَبَدِ، بِلَا انْقِطَاعٍ وَلَا نَفَادٍ، صَلَاةً تُنْجِينَا بِهَا مِنْ حَرِّ جَهَنَّمَ وَبِئْسَ الْمِهَادِ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً مَا صَلَّاهَا مُصَلٍّ مُنْذُ أَوَّلِ الدَّهْرِ، وَصَلَاةً يُصَلِّيهَا الْمُصَلُّونَ إِلَى آخِرِ الدَّهْرِ، كَفَضْلِ صَلَاتِهِمْ عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ، وَكَفَضْلِهِ عَلَى سَائِرِ خَلْقِهِ، وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ صَلَاةً تَلِيقُ بِشَرَفِهِ وَمِقْدَارِهِ الْعَظِيمِ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، الْبَحْرِ الزَّاخِرِ، وَالنُّورِ الْبَاهِرِ، صَلَاةً تَمْلَأُ الْأَقْطَارَ، وَتَكُونُ لَنَا بِهَا نَجَاةً مِنَ النَّارِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ، صَلَاةً لَا نِهَايَةَ لِكَمَالِهَا، وَلَا فَنَاءَ لِدَوَامِهَا.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَاةً تَكُونُ لَكَ قُرْبَةً، وَلَهُ جَزَاءً، وَلَنَا صَلَاحًا.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ الَّذِي هُوَ قُطْبُ الْجَلَالَةِ، وَشَمْسُ النُّبُوَّةِ وَالرِّسَالَةِ، وَالدَّالُّ عَلَيْكَ، وَالْآخِذُ بِكَ إِلَيْكَ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ، وَأَذِقْنَا حَلَاوَةَ وِصَالِهِ، وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ كَمَالِهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى ذَلِكَ.

awrad_wednesday.main:
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَاةً دَائِمَةً بِدَوَامِكَ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَاةً لَا مُنْتَهَى لَهَا كَمَا لَا نِهَايَةَ لِكَمَالِكَ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ، صَلَاةً تَلِيقُ بِجَمَالِهِ وَجَلَالِهِ وَكَمَالِهِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ، وَأَذِقْنَا بِالصَّلَاةِ عَلَيْهِ لَذَّةَ وِصَالِهِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكَ الْمُصْطَفَى، وَرَسُولِكَ الْمُرْتَضَى، وَوَلِيِّكَ الْمُجْتَبَى، وَأَمِينِكَ عَلَى وَحْيِ السَّمَاءِ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، أَكْرَمِ الْأَسْلَافِ، الْمُشَرَّفِ عَلَى كُلِّ الْأَطْرَافِ، الْمَوْصُوفِ بِالْأَوْصَافِ الشِّرَافِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، السَّابِقِ إِلَى الْأَنَامِ نُورُهُ، وَالرَّحْمَةِ لِلْعَالَمِينَ ظُهُورُهُ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَاحِبِ الْحَوْضِ الْمَوْرُودِ، وَالْمَقَامِ الْمَحْمُودِ، وَاللِّوَاءِ الْمَعْقُودِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، الَّذِي هُوَ أَفْضَلُ مَنْ قَامَ وَقَعَدَ، وَأَشْرَفُ مَنْ شَهِدَ وَشُهِدَ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً تَزِيدُ فِي حَسَنَاتِنَا، وَتُذْهِبُ بِهَا سَيِّئَاتِنَا، وَتُعْلِي بِهَا دَرَجَاتِنَا.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً لَا يَلْحَقُهَا لَاحِقٌ، وَلَا يَفُوقُهَا فَائِقٌ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً تَكُونُ لَنَا نُورًا وَهُدًى، وَسَنَدًا وَمَدَدًا.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، عَدَدَ مَا فِي عِلْمِ اللَّهِ، صَلَاةً دَائِمَةً بِدَوَامِ مُلْكِ اللَّهِ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً تُوجِبُ لَنَا بِهَا شَفَاعَتَهُ، وَتُقَرِّبُنَا بِهَا مِنْ حَضْرَتِهِ، وَتُورِدُنَا بِهَا حَوْضَهُ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً تُبَلِّغُنَا بِهَا فِي الدَّارَيْنِ عَظِيمَ وَسِيلَتِهِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، الْوَاصِفِ لَكَ، وَالدَّالِّ عَلَيْكَ، الْقَائِمِ بِحَقِّكَ، وَالْمُبَيِّنِ لِأَمْرِكَ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً تُفَرِّجُ بِهَا الْكُرُوبَ، وَتُصْلِحُ بِهَا الْقُلُوبَ، وَتَغْفِرُ بِهَا الذُّنُوبَ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، الَّذِي جَاءَ بِالْحَقِّ الْمُبِينِ، وَأُرْسِلَ رَحْمَةً لِلْعَالَمِينَ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا أَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ نُصَلِّيَ عَلَيْهِ، وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يُصَلَّى عَلَيْهِ.

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى نَبِيِّكَ الْمُصْطَفَى، وَرَسُولِكَ الْمُرْتَضَى، وَوَلِيِّكَ الْمُجْتَبَى، وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَأَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ، صَلَاةً تُرْضِيكَ وَتُرْضِيهِ وَتَرْضَى بِهَا عَنَّا يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ، وَرَبَّ الرُّكْنِ وَالْمَقَامِ، أَقْرِئْ لِسَيِّدِنَا وَمَوْلَانَا وَشَفِيعِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ مِنَّا السَّلَامَ.

munajat_1.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي أَسْكَنْتَنَا دَاراً حَفَرَتْ لَنَا حُفَرَ مَكْرِهَا، وَعَلَّقَتْنَا بِأَيْدِي الْمَنَايَا فِي حَبَائِلِ غَدْرِهَا، فَإِلَيْكَ نَلْتَجِئُ مِنْ مَكَائِدِ خُدَعِهَا، وَبِكَ نَعْتَصِمُ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِزَخَارِفِ زِينَتِهَا، فَإِنَّهَا الْمُهْلِكَةُ طُلَّابَهَا، الْمُتْلِفَةُ حُلَّالَهَا، الْمَحْشُوَّةُ بِالْآفَاتِ، الْمَشْحُونَةُ بِالنَّكَبَاتِ.

إِلَهِي فَزَهِّدْنَا فِيهَا وَسَلِّمْنَا مِنْهَا بِتَوْفِيقِكَ وَعِصْمَتِكَ، وَانْزَعْ عَنَّا جَلَابِيبَ مُخَالَفَتِكَ، وَتَوَلَّ أُمُورَنَا بِحُسْنِ كِفَايَتِكَ، وَأَوْفِرْ مَزِيدَنَا مِنْ سَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَأَجْمِلْ صِلَاتِنَا مِنْ فَيْضِ مَوَاهِبِكَ، وَاغْرِسْ فِي أَفْئِدَتِنَا أَشْجَارَ مَحَبَّتِكَ، وَأَتْمِمْ لَنَا أَنْوَارَ مَعْرِفَتِكَ، وَأَذِقْنَا حَلَاوَةَ عَفْوِكَ وَمَغْفِرَتِكَ، وَأَشْعِرْ قُلُوبَنَا بَرْدَ أَمْنِكَ وَأَمَانِكَ، وَأَقِرَّ أَعْيُنَنَا بِنَظَرِنَا إِلَيْكَ يَوْمَ لِقَائِكَ، وَهَبْ لَنَا صِدْقَ التَّوَكُّلِ عَلَيْكَ، وَحُسْنَ الظَّنِّ بِكَ، وَالثِّقَةَ بِمَا عِنْدَكَ، حَتَّى لَا يَكُونَ رَجَاؤُنَا إِلَّا لَكَ، وَخَوْفُنَا إِلَّا مِنْكَ، وَتَضَرُّعُنَا إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ، فَإِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْمَوْلَى الْحَقُّ الْمُبِينُ، وَأَنْتَ الْمُجِيبُ الْكَرِيمُ.

إِلَهِي مَا لِي مِنْ حَوْلٍ فَأَنْتَقِلَ بِهِ عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ، وَلَا قُوَّةٍ فَأَنْتَصِرَ بِهَا عَلَى نَفْسِي، إِلَّا بِعِصْمَتِكَ وَتَوْفِيقِكَ، فَأَعِنِّي بِحَوْلِكَ وَقُوَّتِكَ، وَأَيِّدْنِي بِنُصْرَتِكَ، وَاحْفَظْنِي بِعَيْنِكَ الَّتِي لَا تَنَامُ، وَأَدْخِلْنِي فِي حِصْنِكَ الْحَصِينِ، وَاسْتُرْنِي بِسِتْرِكَ الْوَاقِي، فَإِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ.

إِلَهِي مَا حَقُّ مَنْ لَاذَ بِكَ أَنْ يُخَيَّبَ، وَلَا حَقُّ مَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِعُرْوَةِ عَطْفِكَ أَنْ يُخْذَلَ، وَلَا يَلِيقُ بِمَنِ اسْتَجَارَ بِعِزِّكَ أَنْ يُسْلَمَ أَوْ يُهْمَلَ.

إِلَهِي فَلَا تُخْلِنَا مِنْ حِمَايَتِكَ، وَلَا تُعْرِنَا مِنْ رِعَايَتِكَ، وَذُدْنَا عَنْ مَوَارِدِ الْهَلَكَةِ، فَإِنَّا بِعَيْنِكَ وَفِي كَنَفِكَ، وَلَكَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَهْلِ خَاصَّتِكَ مِنْ مَلَائِكَتِكَ، وَالصَّالِحِينَ مِنْ بَرِيَّتِكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ عَلَيْنَا وَاقِيَةً تُنْجِينَا مِنَ الْهَلَكَاتِ، وَتُجَنِّبُنَا مِنَ الْآفَاتِ، وَتُكِنُّنَا مِنْ دَوَاهِي الْمُصِيبَاتِ، وَأَنْ تُنْزِلَ عَلَيْنَا مِنْ سَكِينَتِكَ، وَأَنْ تُغَشِّيَ وُجُوهَنَا بِأَنْوَارِ مَحَبَّتِكَ، وَأَنْ تُؤْوِيَنَا إِلَى شَدِيدِ رُكْنِكَ، وَأَنْ تَحْوِيَنَا فِي أَكْنَافِ عِصْمَتِكَ، بِرَأْفَتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ

munajat_10.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي أَذْهَلَنِي عَنْ إِقَامَةِ شُكْرِكَ تَتَابُعُ طَوْلِكَ، وَأَعْجَزَنِي عَنْ إِحْصَاءِ ثَنَائِكَ فَيْضُ فَضْلِكَ، وَشَغَلَنِي عَنْ ذِكْرِ مَحَامِدِكَ تَرَادُفُ عَوَائِدِكَ، وَأَعْيَانِي عَنْ نَشْرِ عَوَارِفِكَ تَوَالِي أَيَادِيكَ، وَهَذَا مَقَامُ مَنِ اعْتَرَفَ بِسُبُوغِ النَّعْمَاءِ، وَقَابَلَهَا بِالتَّقْصِيرِ، وَشَهِدَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ بِالْإِهْمَالِ وَالتَّضْيِيعِ، وَأَنْتَ الرَّءُوفُ الرَّحِيمُ، الْبَرُّ الْكَرِيمُ، الَّذِي لَا يُخَيِّبُ قَاصِديِهِ، وَلَا يَطْرُدُ عَنْ فِنَائِهِ آمِلِيهِ.

إِلَهِي تَصَاغَرَ عِنْدَ تَعَاظُمِ آلَائِكَ شُكْرِي، وَتَضَاءَلَ فِي جَنْبِ إِكْرَامِكَ إِيَّايَ ثَنَائِي، وَنَأَى عَنْ بُلُوغِ أَدْنَى شُكْرِكَ حَمْدِي، وَتَقَاصَرَ عَنْ إِدْرَاكِ غَايَةِ إِنْعَامِكَ تَعْدَادِي.

إِلَهِي إِنْ طَالَ فِي عِصْيَانِكَ عُمُرِي، وَعَظُمَ فِي الصُّحُفِ ذَنْبِي، فَمَا أَنَا بِمُؤَمِّلٍ غَيْرَ غُفْرَانِكَ، وَلَا أَنَا بِرَاجٍ غَيْرَ رِضْوَانِكَ، وَلَا أَنَا بِمُسْتَجِيرٍ غَيْرَ عَفْوِكَ، وَلَا أَنَا بِمُسْتَعِينٍ غَيْرَ مَعُونَتِكَ، وَأَنْتَ الْمَالِكُ لِمَا مَلَّكْتَنِي، وَالْقَادِرُ عَلَى مَا عَلَيْهِ أَقْدَرْتَنِي، فَمَا أَعْطَيْتَنِي مِنْ قُوَّةٍ فَلَا تَسْلُبْهُ، وَمَا وَهَبْتَ لِي مِنْ كَرَمِكَ فَلَا تَسْلُبْهُ، وَمَا سَتَرْتَهُ عَلَيَّ بِحِلْمِكَ فَلَا تَهْتِكْهُ، وَمَا عَلِمْتَهُ مِنْ قَبِيحِ فِعْلِي فَاغْفِرْهُ.

إِلَهِي فَكَمَا غَذَّيْتَنَا بِلُطْفِكَ، وَرَبَّيْتَنَا بِصُنْعِكَ، فَتَمِّمْ عَلَيْنَا سَوَابِغَ النِّعَمِ، وَادْفَعْ عَنَّا مَكَارِهَ النِّقَمِ، وَآتِنَا مِنْ حُظُوظِ الدَّارَيْنِ أَرْفَعَهَا وَأَجَلَّهَا عَاجِلًا وَآجِلًا، وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى حُسْنِ بَلَائِكَ وَسُبُوغِ نَعْمَائِكَ، حَمْداً يُوَافِقُ رِضَاكَ، وَيَمْتَرِي الْعَظِيمَ مِنْ بِرِّكَ وَنَدَاكَ، يَا عَظِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_11.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَلَّ زَادِي فِي الْمَسِيرِ إِلَيْكَ، فَلَقَدْ حَسُنَ ظَنِّي بِالتَّوَكُّلِ عَلَيْكَ، وَإِنْ كَانَ جُرْمِي قَدْ أَخَافَنِي مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، فَإِنَّ رَجَائِي قَدْ أَشْعَرَنِي بِالْأَمْنِ مِنْ نَقِمَتِكَ، وَإِنْ كَانَ ذَنْبِي قَدْ عَرَّضَنِي لِعِقَابِكَ، فَقَدْ آذَنَنِي حُسْنُ ثِقَتِي بِثَوَابِكَ، وَإِنْ أَنَامَتْنِي الْغَفْلَةُ عَنِ الِاسْتِعْدَادِ لِلِقَائِكَ، فَقَدْ نَبَّهَتْنِي الْمَعْرِفَةُ بِكَرَمِكَ وَآلَائِكَ، وَإِنْ أَوْحَشَ مَا بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكَ فَرْطُ الْعِصْيَانِ وَالطُّغْيَانِ، فَقَدْ آنَسَنِي بُشْرَى الْغُفْرَانِ وَالرِّضْوَانِ.

أَسْأَلُكَ بِسُبُحَاتِ وَجْهِكَ وَبِأَنْوَارِ قُدْسِكَ، وَأَبْتَهِلُ إِلَيْكَ بِعَوَاطِفِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَلَطَائِفِ بِرِّكَ، أَنْ تُحَقِّقَ ظَنِّي بِمَا أُؤَمِّلُهُ مِنْ جَزِيلِ الثَّوَابِ، وَتُصَدِّقَ رَجَائِي بِمَا أَرْجُوهُ مِنْ جَمِيلِ الْمَآبِ.

إِلَهِي مَا أَنْتَ صَانِعٌ بِمَنْ جَعَلَ رَجَاءَهُ جَمِيلَ عَفْوِكَ، وَسَعَى فِي طَلَبِ مَرْضَاتِكَ، وَأَلْقَى بِيَدِهِ إِلَى حَبْلِ طَاعَتِكَ، وَتَعَلَّقَ بِأَسْبَابِ مَحَبَّتِكَ، وَأَنَاخَ بِبَابِ كَرَمِكَ، وَقَصَدَ إِلَى جَنَابِ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَأَمَّلَ فَضْلَ مَوَاهِبِكَ، وَاسْتَجَارَ بِجَمِيلِ سَتْرِكَ، وَاسْتَظَلَّ بِظِلِّ عَفْوِكَ.

إِلَهِي لَا تُخَيِّبْ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ مُعْطِياً غَيْرَكَ، وَلَا تَرُدَّ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ مُؤَمِّلًا سِوَاكَ، فَمَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ فَلَا تَسْلُبْهُ، وَمَا وَهَبْتَ لِي مِنْ كَرَمِكَ فَلَا تَنْزِعْهُ، وَمَا سَتَرْتَهُ عَلَيَّ بِحِلْمِكَ فَلَا تَهْتِكْهُ، وَمَا عَلِمْتَهُ مِنْ قَبِيحِ فِعْلِي فَاغْفِرْهُ.

إِلَهِي اسْتَشْفَعْتُ بِكَ إِلَيْكَ، وَاسْتَجَرْتُ بِكَ مِنْكَ، أَتَيْتُكَ طَامِعاً فِي إِحْسَانِكَ، رَاغِباً فِي امْتِنَانِكَ، مُسْتَسْقِياً وَابِلَ طَوْلِكَ، مُسْتَمْطِراً غَمَامَ فَضْلِكَ، طَالِباً مَرْضَاتَكَ، قَاصِداً جَنَابَكَ، وَارِداً شَرِيعَةَ رِفْدِكَ، مُلْتَمِساً سَنِيَّ الْخَيْرَاتِ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَافِداً إِلَى حَضْرَةِ جَمَالِكَ، مُرِيداً وَجْهَكَ، طَارِقاً بَابَكَ، مُسْتَكِيناً لِعَظَمَتِكَ وَجَلَالِكَ، فَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ مِنَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ وَالرَّحْمَةِ، وَلَا تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ وَالنَّقِمَةِ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_12.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


يَا مَنْ إِذَا سَأَلَهُ عَبْدٌ أَعْطَاهُ، وَإِذَا أَمَّلَ مَا عِنْدَهُ بَلَّغَهُ مُنَاهُ، وَإِذَا أَقْبَلَ عَلَيْهِ قَرَّبَهُ وَأَدْنَاهُ، وَإِذَا جَاهَرَهُ بِالْعِصْيَانِ سَتَرَ عَلَيْهِ وَغَطَّاهُ، وَإِذَا تَوَكَّلَ عَلَيْهِ أَحْسَبَهُ وَكَفَاهُ.

إِلَهِي مَنِ الَّذِي نَزَلَ بِكَ مُلْتَمِساً قِرَاكَ فَمَا قَرَيْتَهُ، وَمَنِ الَّذِي أَنَاخَ بِبَابِكَ مُرْتَجِياً نَدَاكَ فَمَا أَوْلَيْتَهُ، أَيَحْسُنُ أَنْ أَرْجِعَ عَنْ بَابِكَ بِالْخَيْبَةِ مَصْرُوفاً، وَلَسْتُ أَعْرِفُ سِوَاكَ مَوْلًى بِالْإِحْسَانِ مَوْصُوفاً، كَيْفَ أَرْجُو غَيْرَكَ وَالْخَيْرُ كُلُّهُ بِيَدِكَ، وَكَيْفَ أُؤَمِّلُ سِوَاكَ وَالْخَلْقُ وَالْأَمْرُ لَكَ.

إِلَهِي كَيْفَ أَخِيبُ وَأَنْتَ أَمَلِي، أَمْ كَيْفَ أُهَانُ وَعَلَيْكَ مُتَّكَلِي، أَمْ كَيْفَ أَسْتَذِلُّ وَبِكَ عِزِّي، كَيْفَ أُضَامُ وَأَنْتَ نَاصِرِي، أَمْ كَيْفَ أَضِيعُ وَأَنْتَ حَافِظِي، أَمْ كَيْفَ أَضِلُّ وَأَنْتَ دَلِيلِي، أَمْ كَيْفَ أَفْتَقِرُ وَأَنْتَ غَنِيِّي، كَيْفَ أَسْتَوْحِشُ وَأَنْتَ مُؤْنِسِي، كَيْفَ أَعْثُرُ وَأَنْتَ مُقِيلِي، كَيْفَ أُخْذَلُ وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، كَيْفَ أَذِلُّ وَمِنْكَ عِزِّي، كَيْفَ أَفْتَقِرُ وَإِلَيْكَ مَرْجِعِي، كَيْفَ أَضِلُّ وَأَنْتَ هَادِي، كَيْفَ أَضَامُ وَأَنْتَ ذَابٌّ عَنِّي، كَيْفَ أُغْلَبُ وَأَنْتَ نَاصِرِي، كَيْفَ أَلْهُو عَنْكَ وَأَنْتَ مُرَاقِبِي.

إِلَهِي بِذَيْلِ كَرَمِكَ أَعْلَقْتُ يَدِي، وَلِنَيْلِ عَطَايَاكَ بَسَطْتُ أَمَلِي، فَأَخْلِصْنِي بِخَالِصَةِ تَوْحِيدِكَ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَفْوَةِ عَبِيدِكَ، يَا مَنْ كُلُّ هَارِبٍ إِلَيْهِ يَلْتَجِئُ، وَكُلُّ طَالِبٍ إِيَّاهُ يَرْتَجِي، يَا خَيْرَ مَرْجُوٍّ، وَيَا أَكْرَمَ مَدْعُوٍّ، وَيَا مَنْ لَا يُرَدُّ سَائِلُهُ، وَلَا يُخَيَّبُ آمِلُهُ، يَا مَنْ بَابُهُ مَفْتُوحٌ لِدَاعِيهِ، وَحِجَابُهُ مَرْفُوعٌ لِرَاجِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَرَمِكَ أَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِمَا تَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنِي، وَمِنْ رَجَائِكَ بِمَا تَطْمَئِنُّ بِهِ نَفْسِي، وَمِنَ الْيَقِينِ بِمَا تُهَوِّنُ بِهِ عَلَيَّ مُصِيبَاتِ الدُّنْيَا، وَتَجْلُو بِهِ عَنْ بَصِيرَتِي غَشَوَاتِ الْعَمَى، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_13.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي أَتُرَاكَ بَعْدَ الْإِيمَانِ بِكَ تُعَذِّبُنِي، أَمْ بَعْدَ حُبِّي إِيَّاكَ تُبَعِّدُنِي، أَمْ مَعَ رَجَائِي لِرَحْمَتِكَ وَصَفْحِكَ تَحْرِمُنِي، أَمْ مَعَ اسْتِجَارَتِي بِعَفْوِكَ تُسْلِمُنِي، حَاشَا لِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ أَنْ تُخَيِّبَنِي، لَيْتَ شِعْرِي أَلِلشَّقَاءِ وَلَدَتْنِي أُمِّي، أَمْ لِلْعَنَاءِ رَبَّتْنِي، فَلَيْتَهَا لَمْ تَلِدْنِي وَلَمْ تُرَبِّنِي، وَلَيْتَنِي عَلِمْتُ أَمِنْ أَهْلِ السَّعَادَةِ جَعَلْتَنِي، وَبِقُرْبِكَ وَجِوَارِكَ خَصَصْتَنِي، فَتَقِرَّ بِذَلِكَ عَيْنِي وَتَطْمَئِنَّ لَهُ نَفْسِي.

إِلَهِي هَلْ تُسَوِّدُ وُجُوهاً خَرَّتْ سَاجِدَةً لِعَظَمَتِكَ، أَوْ تُخْرِسُ أَلْسِنَةً نَطَقَتْ بِالثَّنَاءِ عَلَى مَجْدِكَ وَجَلَالَتِكَ، أَوْ تَطْبَعُ عَلَى قُلُوبٍ انْطَوَتْ عَلَى مَحَبَّتِكَ، أَوْ تُصِمُّ أَسْمَاعاً تَلَذَّذَتْ بِسَمَاعِ ذِكْرِكَ فِي إِعْلَانِكَ، أَوْ تَغُلُّ أَيْدِياً رَفَعَتْهَا الْآمَالُ إِلَيْكَ رَجَاءَ رَأْفَتِكَ، أَوْ تُعَذِّبُ أَرْجُلًا سَعَتْ فِي عِبَادَتِكَ.

إِلَهِي لَا تُغْلِقْ عَلَى مُوَحِّدِيكَ أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَلَا تَحْجُبْ مُشْتَاقِيكَ عَنِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى جَمِيلِ رُؤْيَتِكَ.

إِلَهِي نَفْسٌ أَعْزَزْتَهَا بِتَوْحِيدِكَ كَيْفَ تُذِلُّهَا بِمَهَانَةِ هِجْرَانِكَ، وَضَمِيرٌ انْعَقَدَ عَلَى مَوَدَّتِكَ كَيْفَ تُحْرِقُهُ بِحَرَارَةِ نِيرَانِكَ.

إِلَهِي أَجِرْنِي مِنْ أَلِيمِ غَضَبِكَ وَعَظِيمِ سَخَطِكَ، يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ يَا رَحِيمُ يَا رَحْمَانُ يَا جَبَّارُ يَا قَهَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ يَا سَتَّارُ، نَجِّنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَفَضِيحَةِ الْعَارِ، إِذَا امْتَازَ الْأَخْيَارُ مِنَ الْأَشْرَارِ، وَحَالَتِ الْأَهْوَالُ، وَقَرُبَ الْمُحْسِنُونَ، وَبَعُدَ الْمُسِيئُونَ، وَوُفِّيَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ.

munajat_14.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي إِلَيْكَ أَشْكُو نَفْساً بِالسُّوءِ أَمَّارَةً، وَإِلَى الْخَطِيئَةِ مُبَادِرَةً، وَبِمَعَاصِيكَ مُولَعَةً، وَبِسَخَطِكَ مُتَعَرِّضَةً، تَسْلُكُ بِي مَسَالِكَ الْمَهَالِكِ، وَتَجْعَلُنِي عِنْدَكَ أَهْوَنَ هَالِكٍ، كَثِيرَةَ الْعِلَلِ، طَوِيلَةَ الْأَمَلِ، إِنْ مَسَّهَا الشَّرُّ تَجْزَعُ، وَإِنْ مَسَّهَا الْخَيْرُ تَمْنَعُ، مَيَّالَةً إِلَى اللَّعْبِ وَاللَّهْوِ، مَمْلُوَّةً بِالْغَفْلَةِ وَالسَّهْوِ، تُسْرِعُ بِي إِلَى الْحَوْبَةِ، وَتُسَوِّفُنِي بِالتَّوْبَةِ.

إِلَهِي أَشْكُو إِلَيْكَ عَدُوّاً يُضِلُّنِي، وَشَيْطَاناً يُغْوِينِي، قَدْ مَلَأَ بِالْوَسْوَاسِ صَدْرِي، وَأَحَاطَتْ هَوَاجِسُهُ بِقَلْبِي، يُعَاضِدُ لِيَ الْهَوَى، وَيُزَيِّنُ لِي حُبَّ الدُّنْيَا، وَيَحُولُ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ الطَّاعَةِ وَالزُّلْفَى.

إِلَهِي إِلَيْكَ أَشْكُو قَلْباً قَاسِياً مَعَ الْوَسْوَاسِ مُتَقَلِّباً، وَبِالرَّيْنِ وَالطَّبْعِ مُتَلَبِّساً، وَعَيْناً عَنِ الْبُكَاءِ مِنْ خَوْفِكَ جَامِدَةً، وَإِلَى مَا يَسُرُّهَا طَامِحَةً.

إِلَهِي لَا حَوْلَ لِي وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَلَا نَجَاةَ لِي مِنْ مَكَارِهِ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا بِعِصْمَتِكَ، فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِبَلَاغَةِ حِكْمَتِكَ وَنَفَاذِ مَشِيَّتِكَ، أَنْ لَا تَجْعَلَنِي لِغَيْرِ جُودِكَ مُتَعَرِّضاً، وَلَا تُصَيِّرَنِي لِلْفِتَنِ غَرَضاً، وَكُنْ لِي عَلَى الْأَعْدَاءِ نَاصِراً، وَعَلَى الْمَخَازِي وَالْعُيُوبِ سَاتِراً، وَمِنَ الْبَلَايَا وَاقِياً، وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي عَاصِماً، بِرَأْفَتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_15.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي أَلْبَسَتْنِي الْخَطَايَا ثَوْبَ مَذَلَّتِي، وَجَلَّلَنِي التَّبَاعُدُ مِنْكَ لِبَاسَ مَسْكَنَتِي، وَأَمَاتَ قَلْبِي عَظِيمُ جِنَايَتِي، فَأَحْيِهِ بِتَوْبَةٍ مِنْكَ يَا أَمَلِي وَبُغْيَتِي، وَيَا سُؤْلِي وَمُنْيَتِي، فَوَ عِزَّتِكَ مَا أَجِدُ لِذُنُوبِي سِوَاكَ غَافِراً، وَلَا أَرَى لِكَسْرِي غَيْرَكَ جَابِراً، وَقَدْ خَضَعْتُ بِالْإِنَابَةِ إِلَيْكَ، وَعَنَوْتُ بِالِاسْتِكَانَةِ لَدَيْكَ، فَإِنْ طَرَدْتَنِي مِنْ بَابِكَ فَبِمَنْ أَلُوذُ، وَإِنْ رَدَدْتَنِي عَنْ جَنَابِكَ فَبِمَنْ أَعُوذُ، فَوَا أَسَفَا مِنْ خَجْلَتِي وَافْتِضَاحِي، وَوَا لَهْفَا مِنْ سُوءِ عَمَلِي وَاجْتِرَاحِي.

أَسْأَلُكَ يَا غَافِرَ الذَّنْبِ الْكَبِيرِ، وَيَا جَابِرَ الْعَظْمِ الْكَسِيرِ، أَنْ تَهَبَ لِي مُوبِقَاتِ الْجَرَائِرِ، وَتَسْتُرَ عَلَيَّ فَاضِحَاتِ السَّرَائِرِ، وَلَا تُخْزِنِي يَوْمَ تُبْلَى السَّرَائِرُ، وَتَظْهَرُ الْمَخَازِي وَالْمَسَاوِي، يَوْمَ ﴿لَا يَنْفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ * إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى اللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ﴾.

إِلَهِي إِنِّي أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكَ، نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ، صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ، أَنْ تُقِيلَ عَثْرَتِي، وَتَنْفِسَ كُرْبَتِي، وَتَقْضِيَ حَاجَتِي.

إِلَهِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الَّذِي فَتَحْتَ لِعِبَادِكَ بَاباً إِلَى عَفْوِكَ سَمَّيْتَهُ التَّوْبَةَ، فَقُلْتَ: ﴿تُوبُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً﴾، فَمَا عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ الْبَابِ بَعْدَ فَتْحِهِ.

إِلَهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَبُحَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ، فَلْيَحْسُنِ الْعَفْوُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ.

إِلَهِي مَا أَنَا بِأَوَّلِ مَنْ عَصَاكَ فَتُبْتَ عَلَيْهِ، وَتَعَرَّضَ لِمَعْرُوفِكَ فَجُدْتَ عَلَيْهِ، يَا مُجِيبَ الْمُضْطَرِّ، يَا كَاشِفَ الضُّرِّ، يَا عَظِيمَ الْبِرِّ، يَا عَلِيماً بِمَا فِي السِّرِّ، يَا جَمِيلَ السَّتْرِ، اسْتَشْفَعْتُ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ إِلَيْكَ، وَتَوَسَّلْتُ بِحَنَانِكَ وَتَرَحُّمِكَ لَدَيْكَ، فَاسْتَجِبْ دُعَائِي، وَلَا تُخَيِّبْ فِيكَ رَجَائِي، وَتَقَبَّلْ تَوْبَتِي، وَكَفِّرْ خَطِيئَتِي، بِمَنِّكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_2.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي نَزَلَ بِكَ مُلْتَمِساً قِرَاكَ فَمَا قَرَيْتَهُ، وَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي أَنَاخَ بِبَابِكَ مُرْتَجِياً نَدَاكَ فَمَا أَوْلَيْتَهُ، أَيَحْسُنُ أَنْ أَرْجِعَ عَنْ بَابِكَ بِالْخَيْبَةِ مَصْرُوفاً، وَلَسْتُ أَعْرِفُ سِوَاكَ مَوْلًى بِالْإِحْسَانِ مَوْصُوفاً.

إِلَهِي أَنْتَ الَّذِي فَتَحْتَ لِعِبَادِكَ بَاباً إِلَى عَفْوِكَ سَمَّيْتَهُ التَّوْبَةَ، فَقُلْتَ: ﴿تُوبُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً﴾، فَمَا عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ الْبَابِ بَعْدَ فَتْحِهِ.

إِلَهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَبُحَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ، فَلْيَحْسُنِ الْعَفْوُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ.

إِلَهِي مَا أَنَا بِأَوَّلِ مَنْ عَصَاكَ فَتُبْتَ عَلَيْهِ، وَتَعَرَّضَ لِمَعْرُوفِكَ فَجُدْتَ عَلَيْهِ، يَا مُجِيبَ الْمُضْطَرِّ، يَا كَاشِفَ الضُّرِّ، يَا عَظِيمَ الْبِرِّ، يَا عَلِيماً بِمَا فِي السِّرِّ، يَا جَمِيلَ السَّتْرِ، اسْتَشْفَعْتُ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ إِلَيْكَ، وَتَوَسَّلْتُ بِحَنَانِكَ وَتَرَحُّمِكَ لَدَيْكَ، فَاسْتَجِبْ دُعَائِي، وَلَا تُخَيِّبْ فِيكَ رَجَائِي، وَتَقَبَّلْ تَوْبَتِي، وَكَفِّرْ خَطِيئَتِي، بِمَنِّكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_3.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي لَوْ لَا الْوَاجِبُ مِنْ قَبُولِ أَمْرِكَ لَنَزَّهْتُكَ مِنْ ذِكْرِي إِيَّاكَ، عَلَى أَنَّ ذِكْرِي لَكَ بِقَدْرِي لَا بِقَدْرِكَ، وَمَا عَسَى أَنْ يَبْلُغَ مِقْدَارِي حَتَّى أُجْعَلَ مَحَلًّا لِتَقْدِيسِكَ، وَمِنْ أَعْظَمِ النِّعَمِ عَلَيْنَا جَرَيَانُ ذِكْرِكَ عَلَى أَلْسِنَتِنَا، وَإِذْنُكَ لَنَا بِدُعَائِكَ وَتَنْزِيهِكَ وَتَسْبِيحِكَ.

إِلَهِي فَأَلْهِمْنَا ذِكْرَكَ فِي الْخَلَإِ وَالْمَلَإِ، وَاللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ، وَالْإِعْلَانِ وَالْإِسْرَارِ، وَفِي السَّرَّاءِ وَالضَّرَّاءِ، وَآنِسْنَا بِالذِّكْرِ الْخَفِيِّ، وَاسْتَعْمِلْنَا بِالْعَمَلِ الزَّكِيِّ، وَالسَّعْيِ الْمَرْضِيِّ، وَجَازِنَا بِالْمِيزَانِ الْوَفِيِّ.

إِلَهِي بِكَ هَامَتِ الْقُلُوبُ الْوَالِهَةُ، وَعَلَى مَعْرِفَتِكَ جُمِعَتِ الْعُقُولُ الْمُتَبَايِنَةُ، فَلَا تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ إِلَّا بِذِكْرَاكَ، وَلَا تَسْكُنُ النُّفُوسُ إِلَّا عِنْدَ رُؤْيَاكَ، لَكَ الْحَمْدُ بِمَا عَرَّفْتَنَا مِنْ نَفْسِكَ، وَأَلْهَمْتَنَا مِنْ شُكْرِكَ، وَفَتَحْتَ لَنَا مِنْ أَبْوَابِ الْعِلْمِ بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ.

إِلَهِي أَنْتَ قُلْتَ وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ: ﴿يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ ذِكْرًا كَثِيرًا * وَسَبِّحُوهُ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا﴾، وَقُلْتَ وَقَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ: ﴿فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ﴾، فَأَمَرْتَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ وَوَعَدْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ أَنْ تَذْكُرَنَا، تَشْرِيفاً لَنَا وَتَفْخِيماً وَإِعْظَاماً، وَهَا نَحْنُ ذَاكِرُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنَا، فَأَنْجِزْ لَنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا، يَا ذَاكِرَ الذَّاكِرِينَ، وَيَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_4.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي قَصُرَتِ الْأَلْسُنُ عَنْ بُلُوغِ ثَنَائِكَ كَمَا يَلِيقُ بِجَلَالِكَ، وَعَجَزَتِ الْعُقُولُ عَنْ إِدْرَاكِ كُنْهِ جَمَالِكَ، وَانْحَسَرَتِ الْأَبْصَارُ دُونَ النَّظَرِ إِلَى سُبُحَاتِ وَجْهِكَ، وَلَمْ تَجْعَلْ لِلْخَلْقِ طَرِيقاً إِلَى مَعْرِفَتِكَ إِلَّا بِالْعَجْزِ عَنْ مَعْرِفَتِكَ.

إِلَهِي فَاجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الَّذِينَ تَرَسَّخَتْ أَشْجَارُ الشَّوْقِ إِلَيْكَ فِي حَدَائِقِ صُدُورِهِمْ، وَأَخَذَتْ لَوْعَةُ مَحَبَّتِكَ بِمَجَامِعِ قُلُوبِهِمْ، فَهُمْ إِلَى أَوْكَارِ الْأَفْكَارِ يَأْوُونَ، وَفِي رِيَاضِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمُكَاشَفَةِ يَرْتَعُونَ، وَمِنْ حِيَاضِ الْمَحَبَّةِ بِكَأْسِ الْمُلَاطَفَةِ يَكْرَعُونَ، وَشَرَائِعِ الْمُصَافَاةِ يَرِدُونَ، قَدْ كُشِفَ الْغِطَاءُ عَنْ أَبْصَارِهِمْ، وَانْجَلَتْ ظُلْمَةُ الرَّيْبِ عَنْ عَقَائِدِهِمْ وَأَسْرَارِهِمْ، وَانْشَرَحَتْ بِمَعْرِفَةِ الْمَعْبُودِ صُدُورُهُمْ، وَاطْمَأَنَّتْ بِالرُّجُوعِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْأَرْبَابِ أَنْفُسُهُمْ.

إِلَهِي مَا أَلَذَّ خَوَاطِرَ الْإِلْهَامِ بِذِكْرِكَ عَلَى الْقُلُوبِ، وَمَا أَحْلَى الْمَسِيرَ إِلَيْكَ بِالْأَوْهَامِ فِي مَسَالِكِ الْغُيُوبِ، وَمَا أَطْيَبَ طَعْمَ حُبِّكَ، وَمَا أَعْذَبَ شِرْبَ قُرْبِكَ، فَأَعِذْنَا مِنْ طَرْدِكَ وَإِبْعَادِكَ، وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنْ أَخَصِّ عَارِفِيكَ، وَأَصْلَحِ عِبَادِكَ، وَأَصْدَقِ طَائِعِيكَ، وَأَخْلَصِ عُبَّادِكَ، يَا عَظِيمُ يَا جَلِيلُ، يَا كَرِيمُ يَا مُنِيلُ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ وَمَنِّكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ

munajat_5.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي كَسْرِي لَا يَجْبُرُهُ إِلَّا لُطْفُكَ وَحَنَانُكَ، وَفَقْرِي لَا يُغْنِيهِ إِلَّا عَطْفُكَ وَإِحْسَانُكَ، وَرَوْعَتِي لَا يُسَكِّنُهَا إِلَّا أَمَانُكَ، وَذِلَّتِي لَا يُعِزُّهَا إِلَّا سُلْطَانُكَ، وَأُمْنِيَّتِي لَا يُبَلِّغُنِيهَا إِلَّا فَضْلُكَ، وَخَلَّتِي لَا يَسُدُّهَا إِلَّا طَوْلُكَ، وَحَاجَتِي لَا يَقْضِيهَا غَيْرُكَ، وَكَرْبِي لَا يُفَرِّجُهَا سِوَى رَحْمَتِكَ، وَضُرِّي لَا يَكْشِفُهُ غَيْرُ رَأْفَتِكَ، وَغُلَّتِي لَا يُبَرِّدُهَا إِلَّا وَصْلُكَ، وَلَوْعَتِي لَا يُطْفِئُهَا إِلَّا لِقَاؤُكَ، وَشَوْقِي إِلَيْكَ لَا يَبُلُّهُ إِلَّا النَّظَرُ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ، وَقَرَارِي لَا يَقِرُّ دُونَ دُنُوِّي مِنْكَ.

إِلَهِي أَنْتَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ، الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ، الْقَادِرُ الْقَدِيرُ، الْبَاقِي الَّذِي لَا يَزُولُ، وَأَنَا الْمَيِّتُ الْفَانِي، الذَّلِيلُ الْحَقِيرُ، الْعَاجِزُ الْفَقِيرُ.

إِلَهِي فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ، وَلَا تَجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ صَرَفْتَ عَنْ بَابِكَ وَجْهَهُ، وَأَبْعَدْتَ عَنْ قُرْبِكَ مَحَلَّهُ، وَأَخْلَيْتَ مِنْ مَعْرُوفِكَ قَلْبَهُ، يَا رَحْمَانُ يَا رَحِيمُ، يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ، يَا مُجِيبَ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ، وَيَا ذُخْرَ الْمُعْدِمِينَ، وَيَا كَنْزَ الْبَائِسِينَ، وَيَا غِيَاثَ الْمُسْتَغِيثِينَ، وَيَا قَاضِيَ حَوَائِجِ الْفُقَرَاءِ وَالْمَسَاكِينِ، وَيَا أَكْرَمَ الْأَكْرَمِينَ، وَيَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ، لَكَ تَخَضُّعِي وَسُؤَالِي، وَإِلَيْكَ تَضَرُّعِي وَابْتِهَالِي.

إِلَهِي ارْحَمْ عَبْدَكَ الذَّلِيلَ ذَا اللِّسَانِ الْكَلِيلِ وَالْعَمَلِ الْقَلِيلِ، وَامْنُنْ عَلَيْهِ بِطَوْلِكَ الْجَزِيلِ، وَاكْنُفْهُ تَحْتَ ظِلِّكَ الظَّلِيلِ، يَا كَرِيمُ يَا جَمِيلُ، يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_6.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي لَيْسَ لِي وَسِيلَةٌ إِلَيْكَ إِلَّا عَوَاطِفُ رَأْفَتِكَ، وَلَا لِي ذَرِيعَةٌ إِلَيْكَ إِلَّا عَوَاطِفُ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَشَفَاعَةُ نَبِيِّكَ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ وَمُنْقِذِ الْأُمَّةِ مِنَ الْغُمَّةِ، فَاجْعَلْهُمَا لِي سَبَباً إِلَى نَيْلِ غُفْرَانِكَ، وَصَيِّرْهُمَا لِي وُصْلَةً إِلَى الْفَوْزِ بِرِضْوَانِكَ، وَقَدْ حَلَّ رَجَائِي بِحَرَمِ كَرَمِكَ، وَحَطَّ طَمَعِي بِفِنَاءِ جُودِكَ، فَحَقِّقْ فِيكَ أَمَلِي، وَاخْتِمْ بِالْخَيْرِ عَمَلِي، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَفْوَتِكَ الَّذِينَ أَحْلَلْتَهُمْ بُحْبُوحَةَ جَنَّتِكَ، وَبَوَّأْتَهُمْ دَارَ كَرَامَتِكَ، وَأَقْرَرْتَ أَعْيُنَهُمْ بِالنَّظَرِ إِلَيْكَ يَوْمَ لِقَائِكَ، وَأَوْرَثْتَهُمْ مَنَازِلَ الصِّدْقِ فِي جِوَارِكَ.

يَا مَنْ لَا يَفِدُ الْوَافِدُونَ عَلَى أَكْرَمَ مِنْهُ، وَلَا يَجِدُ الْقَاصِدُونَ أَرْحَمَ مِنْهُ، يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ خَلَا بِهِ وَحِيدٌ، وَيَا أَعْطَفَ مَنْ أَوَى إِلَيْهِ طَرِيدٌ، إِلَى سَعَةِ عَفْوِكَ مَدَدْتُ يَدِي، وَبِذَيْلِ كَرَمِكَ أَعْلَقْتُ كَفِّي، فَلَا تُولِنِي الْحِرْمَانَ، وَلَا تَبْتَلِنِي بِالْخَيْبَةِ وَالْخُسْرَانِ، يَا سَمِيعَ الدُّعَاءِ.

munajat_7.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
        
إِلَهِي مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي ذَاقَ حَلَاوَةَ مَحَبَّتِكَ فَرَامَ مِنْكَ بَدَلًا، وَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي أَنِسَ بِقُرْبِكَ فَابْتَغَى عَنْكَ حِوَلًا. إِلَهِي فَاجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنِ اصْطَفَيْتَهُ لِقُرْبِكَ وَوَلَايَتِكَ، وَأَخْلَصْتَهُ لِوُدِّكَ وَمَحَبَّتِكَ، وَشَوَّقْتَهُ إِلَى لِقَائِكَ، وَرَضَّيْتَهُ بِقَضَائِكَ، وَمَنَحْتَهُ بِالنَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ، وَحَبَوْتَهُ بِرِضَاكَ، وَأَعَذْتَهُ مِنْ هَجْرِكَ وَقِلَاكَ، وَبَوَّأْتَهُ مَقْعَدَ الصِّدْقِ فِي جِوَارِكَ، وَخَصَصْتَهُ بِمَعْرِفَتِكَ، وَأَهَّلْتَهُ لِعِبَادَتِكَ، وَهَيَّمْتَهُ لِإِرَادَتِكَ، وَاجْتَبَيْتَهُ لِمُشَاهَدَتِكَ، وَأَخْلَيْتَ وَجْهَهُ لَكَ، وَفَرَّغْتَ فُؤَادَهُ لِحُبِّكَ، وَرَغَّبْتَهُ فِيمَا عِنْدَكَ، وَأَلْهَمْتَهُ ذِكْرَكَ، وَأَوْزَعْتَهُ شُكْرَكَ، وَشَغَلْتَهُ بِطَاعَتِكَ، وَجَعَلْتَهُ مِنْ صَالِحِي بَرِيَّتِكَ، وَاخْتَرْتَهُ لِمُنَاجَاتِكَ، وَقَطَعْتَ عَنْهُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ يَقْطَعُهُ عَنْكَ. اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ دَأْبُهُمُ الِارْتِيَاحُ إِلَيْكَ وَ الْحَنِينُ ، وَ دَهْرُهُمُ الزَّفْرَةُ وَ الْأَنِينُ ، جِبَاهُهُمْ سَاجِدَةٌ لِعَظَمَتِكَ ، وَ عُيُونُهُمْ سَاهِرَةٌ فِي خِدْمَتِكَ، وَدُمُوعُهُمْ سَائِلَةٌ مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ، وَقُلُوبُهُمْ مُتَعَلِّقَةٌ بِمَحَبَّتِكَ، وَأَفْئِدَتُهُمْ مُنْخَلِعَةٌ مِنْ مَهَابَتِكَ، يَا مَنْ أَنْوَارُ قُدْسِهِ لِأَبْصَارِ مُحِبِّيهِ رَائِقَةٌ، وَسُبُحَاتُ وَجْهِهِ لِقُلُوبِ عَارِفِيهِ شَائِقَةٌ، يَا مُنَى قُلُوبِ الْمُشْتَاقِينَ، وَيَا غَايَةُ آمَالِ الْمُحِبِّينَ، أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ، وَحُبَّ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ يُوصِلُنِي إِلَى قُرْبِكَ، وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَكَ أَحَبَّ إِلَيَّ مِمَّا سِوَاكَ، وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ حُبِّي إِيَّاكَ قَائِداً إِلَى رِضْوَانِكَ، وَشَوْقِي إِلَيْكَ ذَائِداً عَنْ عِصْيَانِكَ، وَامْنُنْ بِالنَّظَرِ إِلَيْكَ عَلَيَّ، وَانْظُرْ بِعَيْنِ الْوُدِّ وَالْعَطْفِ إِلَيَّ، وَلَا تَصْرِفْ عَنِّي وَجْهَكَ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِسْعَادِ وَالْحُظْوَةِ عِنْدَكَ، يَا مُجِيبُ، يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

munajat_8.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


سُبْحَانَكَ مَا أَضْيَقَ الطُّرُقَ عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ دَلِيلَهُ، وَمَا أَوْضَحَ الْحَقَّ عِنْدَ مَنْ هَدَيْتَهُ سَبِيلَهُ.

إِلَهِي فَاسْلُكْ بِنَا سُبُلَ الْوُصُولِ إِلَيْكَ، وَسَيِّرْنَا فِي أَقْرَبِ الطُّرُقِ لِلْوُفُودِ عَلَيْكَ، قَرِّبْ عَلَيْنَا الْبَعِيدَ، وَسَهِّلْ عَلَيْنَا الْعَسِيرَ الشَّدِيدَ، وَأَلْحِقْنَا بِالْعِبَادِ الَّذِينَ هُمْ بِالْبِدَارِ إِلَيْكَ يُسَارِعُونَ، وَبَابَكَ عَلَى الدَّوَامِ يَطْرُقُونَ، وَإِيَّاكَ فِي اللَّيْلِ يَعْبُدُونَ، وَهُمْ مِنْ هَيْبَتِكَ مُشْفِقُونَ، الَّذِينَ صَفَّيْتَ لَهُمُ الْمَشَارِبَ، وَبَلَّغْتَهُمُ الرَّغَائِبَ، وَأَنْجَحْتَ لَهُمُ الْمَطَالِبَ، وَقَضَيْتَ لَهُمْ مِنْ وَصْلِكَ الْمَآرِبَ، وَمَلَأْتَ لَهُمْ ضَمَائِرَهُمْ مِنْ حُبِّكَ، وَرَوَّيْتَهُمْ مِنْ صَافِي شِرْبِكَ، فَبِكَ إِلَى بَهْجَةِ الْقُرْبِ وَصَلُوا، وَمِنْكَ رَاحَةَ الْأَمْنِ حَصَّلُوا، وَعَلَيْكَ فِي مَنَازِلِ الصِّدْقِ عَوَّلُوا.

إِلَهِي هَذَا مَقَامُ مَنِ انْقَطَعَتْ إِلَيْكَ هِمَّتِي، وَانْصَرَفَتْ نَحْوَكَ رَغْبَتِي، فَأَنْتَ لَا غَيْرُكَ مُرَادِي، وَلَكَ لَا لِسِوَاكَ سَهَرِي وَسُهَادِي، وَلِقَاؤُكَ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي، وَوَصْلُكَ مُنَى نَفْسِي، وَإِلَيْكَ شَوْقِي، وَفِي مَحَبَّتِكَ وَلَهِي، وَإِلَى هَوَاكَ صَبَابَتِي، وَرِضَاكَ بُغْيَتِي، وَرُؤْيَتُكَ حَاجَتِي، وَجِوَارُكَ طَلِبَتِي، وَقُرْبُكَ غَايَةُ سُؤْلِي، وَفِي مُنَاجَاتِكَ أُنْسِي وَرَاحَتِي، وَعِنْدَكَ دَوَاءُ عِلَّتِي، وَشِفَاءُ غُلَّتِي، وَبَرْدُ لَوْعَتِي، وَكَشْفُ كُرْبَتِي، فَكُنْ أَنِيسِي فِي وَحْشَتِي، وَمُقِيلَ عَثْرَتِي، وَغَافِرَ زَلَّتِي، وَقَابِلَ تَوْبَتِي، وَمُجِيبَ دَعْوَتِي، وَوَلِيَّ عِصْمَتِي، وَمُغْنِيَ فَاقَتِي، وَلَا تَقْطَعْنِي عَنْكَ، وَلَا تُبْعِدْنِي مِنْكَ، يَا نَعِيمِي وَجَنَّتِي، وَيَا دُنْيَايَ وَآخِرَتِي.

munajat_9.main:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ


إِلَهِي أَلْهِمْنَا طَاعَتَكَ وَجَنِّبْنَا مَعَاصِيَكَ، وَيَسِّرْ لَنَا بُلُوغَ مَا نَتَمَنَّى مِنِ ابْتِغَاءِ رِضْوَانِكَ، وَأَحْلِلْنَا بُحْبُوحَةَ جِنَانِكَ، وَاقْشَعْ عَنْ بَصَائِرِنَا سَحَابَ الِارْتِيَابِ، وَاكْشِفْ عَنْ قُلُوبِنَا أَغْشِيَةَ الْمِرْيَةِ وَالْحِجَابِ، وَأَزْهِقِ الْبَاطِلَ عَنْ ضَمَائِرِنَا، وَأَثْبِتِ الْحَقَّ فِي سَرَائِرِنَا، فَإِنَّ الشُّكُوكَ وَالظُّنُونَ لَوَاقِحُ الْفِتَنِ، وَمُكَدِّرَةٌ لِصَفْوِ الْمَنَائِحِ وَالْمِنَنِ.

اللَّهُمَّ احْمِلْنَا فِي سُفُنِ نَجَاتِكَ، وَمَتِّعْنَا بِلَذِيذِ مُنَاجَاتِكَ، وَأَوْرِدْنَا حِيَاضَ حُبِّكَ، وَأَذِقْنَا حَلَاوَةَ وُدِّكَ وَقُرْبِكَ، وَاجْعَلْ جِهَادَنَا فِيكَ، وَهَمَّنَا فِي طَاعَتِكَ، وَأَخْلِصْ نِيَّاتِنَا فِي مُعَامَلَتِكَ، فَإِنَّا بِكَ وَلَكَ، وَلَا وَسِيلَةَ لَنَا إِلَيْكَ إِلَّا بِكَ.

إِلَهِي اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُصْطَفَيْنَ الْأَخْيَارِ، وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ الْأَبْرَارِ، السَّابِقِينَ إِلَى الْمَكْرُمَاتِ، الْمُسَارِعِينَ إِلَى الْخَيْرَاتِ، الْعَامِلِينَ لِلْبَاقِيَاتِ الصَّالِحَاتِ، السَّاعِينَ إِلَى رَفِيعِ الدَّرَجَاتِ، إِنَّكَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، وَبِالْإِجَابَةِ جَدِيرٌ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

wird_ibrahimi.main:
اللهمَّ صلِّ على سيدنا محمدٍ وعلى آلِ سيدنا محمدٍ، كما صليتَ على سيدنا إبراهيمَ وعلى آلِ سيدنا إبراهيمَ، إنكَ حميدٌ مجيدٌ.

اللهمَّ باركْ على سيدنا محمدٍ وعلى آلِ سيدنا محمدٍ، كما باركتَ على سيدنا إبراهيمَ وعلى آلِ سيدنا إبراهيمَ، إنكَ حميدٌ مجيدٌ.

wird_istiftah.main:
بسمِ اللهِ الرحمنِ الرحيمِ

اللهمَّ إني أسألُكَ يا اللهُ بأنكَ الواحدُ الأحدُ الفرد الصمدُ، الذي لم يلدْ ولم يولدْ، ولم يكنْ لهُ كُفُواً أحدٌ، أن تغفرَ لي ذنوبي إنكَ أنتَ الغفورُ الرحيمُ.

اللهمَّ إني أسألُكَ بأنَّ لكَ الحمدُ، لا إلهَ إلا أنتَ وحدكَ لا شريكَ لكَ، المنانُ، يا بديعَ السماواتِ والأرضِ، يا ذا الجلالِ والإكرامِ، يا حيُّ يا قيومُ، إني أسألُكَ الجنةَ وأعوذُ بكَ من النارِ.

اللهمَّ لكَ الحمدُ أنتَ نورُ السماواتِ والأرضِ ومَنْ فيهنَّ، ولكَ الحمدُ أنتَ قيِّمُ السماواتِ والأرضِ ومَنْ فيهنَّ، ولكَ الحمدُ أنتَ ربُّ السماواتِ والأرضِ ومَنْ فيهنَّ، أنتَ الحقُّ، ووعدُكَ الحقُّ، وقولُكَ الحقُّ، ولقاؤكَ حقٌّ، والجنةُ حقٌّ، والنارُ حقٌّ، والنبيونَ حقٌّ، ومحمدٌ صلى الله عليه وسلم حقٌّ، والساعةُ حقٌّ، اللهمَّ لكَ أسلمتُ، وبكَ آمنتُ، وعليكَ توكلتُ، وإليكَ أنبتُ، وبكَ خاصمتُ، وإليكَ حاكمتُ، فاغفرْ لي ما قدمتُ وما أخرتُ، وما أسررتُ وما أعلنتُ، أنتَ إلهي لا إلهَ إلا أنتَ.

سبحانكَ اللهمَّ وبحمدِكَ، وتباركَ اسمُكَ، وتعالى جدُّكَ، ولا إلهَ غيرُكَ.

أعوذُ باللهِ السميعِ العليمِ من الشيطانِ الرجيمِ، من همزِهِ ونفخِهِ ونفثِهِ.

بسمِ اللهِ الرحمنِ الرحيمِ

الحمدُ للهِ ربِّ العالمينَ، الرحمنِ الرحيمِ، مالكِ يومِ الدينِ، إياكَ نعبدُ وإياكَ نستعينُ، اهدِنا الصراطَ المستقيمَ، صراطَ الذينَ أنعمتَ عليهم غيرِ المغضوبِ عليهم ولا الضالينَ. آمين.

اللهمَّ إني أسألُكَ من فضلِكَ ورحمتِكَ، فإنهُ لا يملكُها إلا أنتَ، يا أرحمَ الراحمينَ، يا أكرمَ الأكرمينَ.

wird_ibrahimi.main:
O Allah, send prayers upon our Master Muhammad and upon the family of our Master Muhammad, as You sent prayers upon our Master Ibrahim and upon the family of our Master Ibrahim; You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious.

O Allah, bless our Master Muhammad and the family of our Master Muhammad, as You blessed our Master Ibrahim and the family of our Master Ibrahim; You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious.

wird_istiftah.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O Allah, I ask You, O Allah, by Your being the One, the Only, the Unique, the Eternal, Who begets not nor was He begotten, and there is none co-equal or comparable to Him, that You forgive me my sins, for You are indeed the Oft-Forgiving, the Most Merciful.

O Allah, I ask You by virtue of all praise being Yours; there is no deity but You alone, without partner; the Bestower of favors; O Originator of the heavens and the earth; O Possessor of Majesty and Honor; O Ever-Living, O Self-Subsisting; I ask You for Paradise and I seek refuge in You from the Fire.

O Allah, to You belongs all praise. You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. To You belongs all praise; You are the Sustainer of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. To You belongs all praise; You are the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. You are the Truth, Your promise is true, Your word is true, the meeting with You is true, Paradise is true, the Fire is true, the Prophets are true, Muhammad (peace be upon him) is true, and the Hour is true. O Allah, to You I have submitted, in You I have believed, upon You I have relied, to You I turn in repentance, by Your help I have disputed, and to You I refer for judgment. So forgive me what I have sent before me and what I have left behind, what I have concealed and what I have declared. You are my God; there is no deity except You.

Glory be to You, O Allah, and with Your praise. Blessed is Your Name, exalted is Your Majesty, and there is no deity other than You.

I seek refuge in Allah, the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing, from the accursed Satan, from his madness, his arrogance, and his poetry.

In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds. The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help. Guide us to the straight path. The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray. Amen.

O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty and Your mercy, for none possesses them except You, O Most Merciful of the merciful, O Most Generous of the generous.

explanation.en: O Allah, by You we enter the evening, and by You we enter the morning, and by You we live, and by You we die, and unto You is the return.

munajat_5.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, my breakage is not mended except by Your gentleness and tenderness, my poverty is not enriched except by Your affection and beneficence, my alarm is not calmed except by Your security, my abasement is not honored except by Your sovereignty, my wish is not fulfilled except by Your bounty, my want is not filled except by Your grace, my need is not satisfied by other than You, my distress is not relieved except by Your mercy, my harm is not removed except by Your kindness, my thirst is not cooled except by connection with You, my burning desire is not extinguished except by meeting You, my longing for You is not moistened except by looking at Your Face, and my stability does not settle without drawing near to You.

O my God, You are the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, the Exalted, the Magnificent, the Powerful, the Omnipotent, the Everlasting who does not pass away; and I am the dying, the transient, the abased, the insignificant, the incapable, the poor.

O my God, so send prayers upon Muhammad and his family, and do not make me among those properly turned away from Your door, or whose place You have distanced from Your nearness, or whose heart You have emptied of Your kindness. O Most Merciful, O Most Compassionate, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor, O Responder to the distressed, O Treasure of the destitute, O Helper of those seeking help, O Fulfiller of the needs of the poor and the miserable, O Most Generous of the generous, O Most Merciful of the merciful. To You is my submission and asking, and to You is my humble entreaty and supplication.

O my God, have mercy on Your abased servant of dull tongue and little deed, bestow upon him Your abundant grace, and shelter him under Your shading shade, O Generous, O Beautiful, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

explanation.en:
Praise be to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.

**Fadl:**
Whoever says this, his past sins will be forgiven.

munajat_3.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, were it not for the obligation to accept Your command, I would have declared You too pure to be mentioned by me, given that my mention of You is according to my measure, not Your measure. And what amount can my worth reach so that I may be made a locus for Your sanctification? Among the greatest favors upon us is the flowing of Your mention upon our tongues, and Your permission to us to supplicate to You, declare Your transcendence, and glorify You.

O my God, so inspire us with Your mention in solitude and in public, in the night and the day, in declaration and in secret, in joy and in adversity. Make us intimate with the hidden remembrance, employ us in pure deeds and pleasing endeavor, and reward us with the full balance.

O my God, hearts distracted with love are enamored by You, and divergent intellects are united upon knowing You. So hearts do not find tranquility except with Your remembrance, and souls do not find rest except at seeing You. To You belongs praise for what You have made known to us of Yourself, inspired us of Your gratitude, and opened for us of the doors of knowledge of Your Lordship.

O my God, You said, and Your word is the Truth: "O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance * And exalt Him morning and afternoon." And You said, and Your word is the Truth: "So remember Me; I will remember you." You commanded us to remember You and promised us upon it that You would remember us, as an honor, magnification, and exaltation for us. And here we are remembering You as You commanded us, so fulfill for us what You promised us, O One who remembers those who remember Him, and O Most Merciful of the merciful.

munajat_15.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, sins have clothed me in the garment of my abasement, and distancing from You has wrapped me in the robe of my misery, and the greatness of my crime has killed my heart. So revive it with a repentance from You, O my Hope and my Aim, O my Request and my Wish. By Your Glory, I do not find for my sins a forgiver other than You, nor do I see for my breakage a mender other than You. I have submitted by turning into You, and I have humbled myself by submissiveness before You. If You drive me away from Your door, then to whom shall I take refuge? And if You turn me back from Your side, then whom shall I seek shelter with? O my sorrow from my shame and disgrace! O my grief from my evil deed and crime!

I ask You, O Forgiver of the great sin, O Mender of the broken bone, that You overlook my destructive crimes, and cover my scandalous secrets, and do not disgrace me on the Day when secrets are tested and shames and evils appear, the Day when "wealth and children will not benefit, except him who comes to Allah with a sound heart."

O my God, I turn to You by Muhammad, Your Prophet, the Prophet of Mercy, upon whom and whose family be peace, that You release my stumble, relieve my distress, and fulfill my need.

O my God, You are the One who opened a door to Your pardon for Your servants and named it Repentance. You said: "Turn to Allah with sincere repentance." So what is the excuse of one who neglects entering the door after its opening?

O my God, if the sin from Your servant is ugly, then let the pardon from You be beautiful.

O my God, I am not the first who disobeyed You and You turned to him in forgiveness, or exposed himself to Your kindness and You were generous to him. O Responder to the distressed, O Remover of harm, O Great in righteousness, O Knower of what is in the secret, O Beautiful in veiling; I seek intercession with You through Your generosity and nobility, and I seek means to You through Your tenderness and mercy. So answer my prayer, do not disappoint my hope in You, accept my repentance, and expiate my sin, by Your grace and mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

awrad_sunday.main:
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a blessing that will be for us a light on the Path (Sirat), and a salvation from the punishment.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a blessing by which You remove our sorrows, and relieve our worries and distresses.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a blessing by which we are granted the perfection of following him, and acting upon his Sunnah.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, a blessing that fills the horizons with light, and makes us in this world and the Hereafter in joy and happiness.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the number of what is in the heavens and what is in the earth and what is between them.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a blessing that is a fulfillment for You, and a performance of his right.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, a blessing by which You save its sayer from the fire of Hell.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, a blessing by which You enter its prayer into the Gardens of Bliss.

awrad_monday.main:
O Allah, send blessings upon him with whom You ended the Prophecy and the Message, our Master Muhammad.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Unlettered Prophet, and upon his Family and Companions, and grant him peace.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, the prayer that is a pleasure for You and a fulfillment of his right.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a blessing that fills the treasuries of Allah with light, and is for us a relief and a joy.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the possessor of the Means (Al-Wasilah), the Virtue, and the High Degree.
O Allah, I ask You by the best of Your asking, and by the most beloved of Your Names to You, and the most noble of them to You, and by what You have favored us with by our Master Muhammad, our Prophet, may Allah bless him and grant him peace, so You saved us by him from error, and commanded us to send blessings upon him, and made our prayer upon him a degree, an expiation, a kindness, and a favor from Your giving; so I call upon You, exalting Your command, following Your testament, and seeking the intercession of Your Prophet, our Master Muhammad, may Allah bless him and grant him peace.

O Allah, make our prayer upon him accepted, and our supplication by him answered, and make us among the people of his intercession.
O Allah, O Lord of Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the Family of Muhammad, and reward Muhammad, may Allah bless him and grant him peace, with what he is worthy of.

O Allah, Lord of the spirits and the decayed bodies, I ask You by the obedience of the spirits returning to their bodies, and by the obedience of the bodies knitting together with their veins, and by Your words penetrating in them, and Your taking of the right from them, while the creatures are before You waiting for the decision of Your decree, hoping for Your mercy, and fearing Your punishment, that You place light in my sight, and Your remembrance by night and day on my tongue, and provide me with righteous deed.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, as long as mountains move, rivers flow, suns shine, and the day illuminates.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, as You love and are pleased for him.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a blessing by which You save us from all terrors and banes, and fulfill for us all needs, and purify us by it from all evil deeds, and raise us by it with You to the highest degrees, and make us reach by it the furthest goals of all good things in life and after death.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the prayer of satisfaction, and be pleased with his Companions, the pleasure of satisfaction.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, whose light preceded the creation, and whose appearance is a mercy to the worlds, the number of those of Your creation who have passed and those who remain, and those of them who are happy and those who are wretched, a prayer that encompasses the count and surrounds the limit, a prayer that has no end, no termination, and no expiration, a prayer conditioned by Your eternity, and upon his Family and Companions, and grant them peace in like manner.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, whose heart You filled with Your Majesty, and whose eye with Your Beauty, so he became happy and joyful, supported and victorious, and upon his Family and Companions, and grant them abundant peace, and praise be to Allah for that.

munajat_6.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, I have no means to You except the affections of Your kindness, nor any pretext to You except the affections of Your mercy, and the intercession of Your Prophet, the Prophet of Mercy and the Savior of the Ummah from grief. So make them for me a cause for attaining Your forgiveness, and make them for me a link to winning Your good pleasure. My hope has dismounted in the sanctuary of Your generosity, and my greed has landed in the courtyard of Your bounty. So realize my hope in You, end my deed with good, and make me among Your elite whom You have settled in the midst of Your Paradise, lodged in the abode of Your honor, gladdened their eyes by looking at You on the day of meeting You, and made them inherit the stations of truthfulness in Your neighborhood.

O One upon whom no incoming guests come to one more generous than Him, and no seekers find one more merciful than Him. O Best of those with whom a lonely one is alone, O Most Tender of those to whom an outcast seeks shelter. To the vastness of Your pardon I have extended my hand, and to the hem of Your generosity I have clung my palm. So do not accord me deprivation, nor afflict me with disappointment and loss, O Hearer of prayer.

explanation.en: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.

munajat_4.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, tongues have fallen short of attaining Your praise as befits Your Majesty, intellects have failed to grasp the essence of Your Beauty, eyes have receded before looking at the glories of Your Face, and You have not made for creation a way to knowing You except by incapacity to know You.

O my God, so make us among those for whom the trees of longing for You have taken root in the gardens of their chests, and the burning of Your love has seized the assemblies of their hearts. So they seek shelter in the nests of thoughts, graze in the gardens of nearness and unveiling, drink from the basins of love with the cup of gentleness, and arrive at the watering places of pure friendship. The veil has been lifted from their visions, the darkness of doubt has cleared from their beliefs and inner secrets, their chests have expanded with the knowledge of the Worshipped, and their souls have found tranquility in returning to the Lord of lords.

O my God, how delicious are the thoughts of inspiration with Your mention upon hearts, how sweet is the journeying to You with imaginations in the paths of the unseen, how good is the taste of Your love, and how fresh is the drink of Your nearness. So grant us refuge from Your expulsion and distancing, and make us among the most special of Your knowers, the most righteous of Your servants, the most truthful of Your obeyers, and the most sincere of Your worshippers. O Great, O Majestic, O Generous, O Bestower, by Your mercy and grace, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

explanation.en: I seek refuge in Allah the Mighty, and in His Noble Face, and in His Eternal Authority, from the accursed Shaitan. In the Name of Allah, and prayers and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.
I seek refuge in the Perfect Words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, goodly provision, and acceptable deeds.

O Allah, I have entered the morning calling You as a witness, and calling the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all Your creation to witness that You are Allah, there is no god but You, Alone, without partner, and that Muhammad is Your slave and Your Messenger.
O Allah, by You we enter the morning, and by You we enter the evening, and by You we live, and by You we die, and unto You is the Final Return.
In Your Name, O Allah, I die and I live.
There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the Kingdom and His is the praise, and He has power over all things.

munajat_13.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, do You see Yourself punishing me after my belief in You? Or distancing me after my love for You? Or depriving me while I hope for Your mercy and pardon? Or surrendering me while I seek refuge in Your pardon? Far be it from Your Noble Face to disappoint me! I wish I knew, did my mother bear me for wretchedness? Or did she raise me for suffering? Would that she had not borne me and not raised me! And would that I knew, have You made me among the people of happiness, and distinguished me with Your nearness and neighborhood? So that my eye would be gladdened by that, and my soul reassured.

O my God, will You blacken faces that have fallen prostrate to Your Greatness? Or mute tongues that have spoken in praise of Your Glory and Majesty? Or seal hearts that have enfolded upon Your love? Or deafen ears that have taken pleasure in hearing Your remembrance in Your declaration? Or shackle hands that hopes have raised to You hoping for Your kindness? Or punish feet that have striven in Your worship?

O my God, do not lock the doors of Your mercy against those who profess Your Oneness, and do not veil those who yearn for You from looking at the beauty of seeing You.

O my God, a soul You have honored with Your Oneness, how can You humiliate it with the ignominy of Your abandonment? And a conscience bound upon Your affection, how can You burn it with the heat of Your fires?

O my God, grant me refuge from the pain of Your anger and the greatness of Your wrath. O Tender, O Bestower, O Merciful, O Compassionate, O Compeller, O Subduer, O Forgiver, O Veiler. Save me by Your mercy from the punishment of the Fire and the scandal of shame, when the good are distinguished from the wicked, the terrors change conditions, the doers of good are brought near, the doers of evil are distanced, and every soul is paid in full what it has earned, and they will not be wronged.

explanation.en: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.

wird_istiftah.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O Allah, I ask You, O Allah, by Your being the One, the Only, the Unique, the Eternal, Who begets not nor was He begotten, and there is none co-equal or comparable to Him, that You forgive me my sins, for You are indeed the Oft-Forgiving, the Most Merciful.

O Allah, I ask You by virtue of all praise being Yours; there is no deity but You alone, without partner; the Bestower of favors; O Originator of the heavens and the earth; O Possessor of Majesty and Honor; O Ever-Living, O Self-Subsisting; I ask You for Paradise and I seek refuge in You from the Fire.

O Allah, to You belongs all praise. You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. To You belongs all praise; You are the Sustainer of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. To You belongs all praise; You are the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them. You are the Truth, Your promise is true, Your word is true, the meeting with You is true, Paradise is true, the Fire is true, the Prophets are true, Muhammad (peace be upon him) is true, and the Hour is true. O Allah, to You I have submitted, in You I have believed, upon You I have relied, to You I turn in repentance, by Your help I have disputed, and to You I refer for judgment. So forgive me what I have sent before me and what I have left behind, what I have concealed and what I have declared. You are my God; there is no deity except You.

Glory be to You, O Allah, and with Your praise. Blessed is Your Name, exalted is Your Majesty, and there is no deity other than You.

I seek refuge in Allah, the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing, from the accursed Satan, from his madness, his arrogance, and his poetry.

In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds. The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help. Guide us to the straight path. The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray. Amen.

O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty and Your mercy, for none possesses them except You, O Most Merciful of the merciful, O Most Generous of the generous.

explanation.en: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest. Glory is to Him Who has subjected this to us, and we were not able to do it. And surely to our Lord we will return.
Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but He. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.
In Your name my Lord, I lay my side down, and in Your name I raise it. If You take my soul, then have mercy on it, and if You send it back, then protect it as You protect Your righteous slaves.

munajat_10.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, the succession of Your bounties has distracted me from performing Your thanks, the overflow of Your favor has rendered me incapable of counting Your praise, the sequence of Your benefits has occupied me from mentioning Your laudations, and the continuity of Your favors has exhausted me from spreading Your kindnesses. This is the station of one who confesses to the lavishness of blessings, meets them with shortcoming, and witnesses against himself negligence and waste. And You are the Compassionate, the Merciful, the Righteous, the Generous, who does not disappoint those who aim for Him, nor drive away from His courtyard those who hope in Him.

O my God, my thanks has become small before the greatness of Your boons, my praise has diminished beside Your honoring of me, my laudation has become distant from reaching the least of Your thanks, and my counting has fallen short of realizing the utmost of Your favoring.

O my God, if my life has become long in disobeying You, and my sin has become great in the scrolls, yet I am not hoping for other than Your forgiveness, nor am I anticipating other than Your good pleasure, nor am I seeking refuge in other than Your pardon, nor am I seeking help in other than Your aid. You are the Owner of what You have made me own, and the Powerful over what You have empowered me. So what strength You have given me, do not take it away; and what You have granted me of Your generosity, do not strip it; and what You have covered me with Your forbearance, do not tear it; and what You have known of my ugly deed, forgive it.

O my God, as You have nourished us with Your gentleness, and raised us with Your making, so complete upon us the lavish blessings, repel from us the detestable retributions, and give us of the shares of the two abodes the highest and most majestic of them, immediate and deferred. To You implies praise for the excellence of Your trial and the lavishness of Your blessings, a praise that agrees with Your good pleasure, and draws out the great of Your righteousness and generosity. O Great, O Generous, by Your mercy O Most Merciful of the merciful.

explanation.en: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
In the Name of Allah, who with His Name nothing can cause harm in the earth nor in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

munajat_11.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, if my provision for the journey to You is little, then my good opinion in relying upon You is great. And if my crime has made me fear Your punishment, then my hope has made me feel secure from Your vengeance. And if my sin has exposed me to Your penalty, then my good trust in Your reward has apprised me. And if negligence has put me to sleep from preparing to meet You, then knowledge of Your generosity and bounties has awakened me. And if excessive disobedience and rebellion have made what is between me and You lonely, then the glad tidings of forgiveness and good pleasure have comforted me.

I ask You by the glories of Your Face and by the lights of Your holiness, and I implore You by the affections of Your mercy and the subtleties of Your righteousness, to realize my opinion in what I hope from Your abundant reward, and to verify my hope in what I anticipate of Your beautiful return.

O my God, what are You doing with one who has made his hope the beauty of Your pardon, strove in seeking Your good pleasure, cast his hand to the rope of Your obedience, clung to the means of Your love, knelt at the door of Your generosity, aimed for the courtyard of Your mercy, hoped for the bounty of Your gifts, sought refuge in the beauty of Your veiling, and sought shade in the shadow of Your pardon?

O my God, do not disappoint one who finds no giver other than You, and do not turn away one who finds no one to hope in other than You. So what You have favored, do not strip it away; and what You have granted me of Your generosity, do not remove it; and what You have covered upon me with Your forbearance, do not tear it; and what You have known of my ugly deed, forgive it.

O my God, I seek intercession with You to You, and I seek refuge in You from You. I have come to You coveting Your beneficence, desiring Your favoring, seeking the watering of the downpour of Your grace, seeking the rain of the cloud of Your bounty, requesting Your good pleasure, aiming for Your courtyard, arriving at the watering place of Your support, seeking the sublime good things from You, coming as a guest to the presence of Your Beauty, wanting Your Face, knocking at Your door, submissive to Your Greatness and Majesty. So do with me what You are worthy of in terms of forgiveness and mercy, and do not do with me what I am worthy of in terms of punishment and vengeance, by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

awrad_wednesday.main:
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a permanent prayer enduring with Your eternity.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a prayer that has no end to it, just as there is no end to Your perfection.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family, a prayer that befits his beauty, majesty, and perfection.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family, and make us taste, through the prayer upon him, the pleasure of his connection.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, Your Chosen Prophet, Your Pleased Messenger, Your Selected Friend, and Your Trustee over the Revelation of Heaven.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Most Noble of Ancestors, the Honored from all sides, the Described with Noble Attributes.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, whose light preceded the creatures, and whose appearance is a mercy to the worlds.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Possessor of the Visited Basin, the Praiseworthy Station, and the Knoted Banner.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, who is the best of those who stood and sat, and the noblest of those who witnessed and were witnessed.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that increases our good deeds, removes our bad deeds, and raises our degrees.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that no one can catch up with, and no surmounter can surpass.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that is for us a light and guidance, a support and an aid.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the number of what is in the knowledge of Allah, a permanent prayer enduring with the duration of the Kingdom of Allah.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You make his intercession incumbent for us, bringing us near to his presence, and bringing us to his Basin.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You make us reach his great Means (Wasilah) in both abodes.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Describer of You, the Guide to You, the Upholder of Your Right, and the Clarifier of Your Command.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You relieve distresses, reform hearts, and forgive sins.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, who came with the clear Truth, and was sent as a mercy to the worlds.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, as You commanded us to send blessings upon him, and send blessings upon him as it should be prayed upon him.

O Allah, send blessings upon Your Chosen Prophet, Your Pleased Messenger, Your Selected Friend, and upon his Family, his Companions, his Wives, and his Descendants.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family, a prayer that pleases You and pleases him, and by which You are pleased with us, O Most Merciful of the merciful.
O Allah, Lord of the Sacred House, and Lord of the Corner (Rukn) and the Station (Maqam), convey from us peace to our Master, our Mawla, and our Intercessor, Muhammad.

explanation.en: We have entered the morning and at this very time the whole Kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. There is no god but Allah, the One; He has no partner. His is the Kingdom and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this day and the good of what follows it, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from laziness and senility. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from torment in the Fire and torment in the grave.

There is no deity but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the Kingdom and His is the praise, and He has power over all things. O Allah, there is none who can withhold what You give, and none may give what You have withheld; and the might of the mighty person cannot benefit him against You.

awrad_tuesday.main:
O Allah, I ask You from the good of what You know, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of what You know, and I ask Your forgiveness for all that You know. Indeed, You are the Knower of the Unseen.
O Allah, have mercy on me from this time of mine and its people, and join me with Your righteous servants.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a blessing that is a pleasure for You, and a fulfillment of his right; and grant him the Means (Al-Wasilah) and the Praiseworthy Station which You promised him; and reward him on our behalf with what he is worthy of; and reward him with the best of what You rewarded a Prophet on behalf of his people and a Messenger on behalf of his nation; and send blessings upon all his brothers among the Prophets and the Righteous, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and settle him in the station near to You on the Day of Resurrection.
O Allah, make Your blessings, Your mercy, and Your benedictions upon the Master of the Messengers, the Imam of the Pious, and the Seal of the Prophets, our Master Muhammad, Your servant and Your Messenger, the Imam of Good, the Leader of Good, and the Messenger of Mercy.
O Allah, raise him to a Praiseworthy Station that the first and the last will envy him for.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, as You sent blessings upon our Master Abraham and upon the Family of our Master Abraham, indeed You are Praiseworthy, Glorious. O Allah, bless our Master Muhammad and the Family of our Master Muhammad, as You blessed our Master Abraham and the Family of our Master Abraham, indeed You are Praiseworthy, Glorious.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, Your servant and Your Messenger, and send blessings upon the believing men and the believing women, and the Muslim men and the Muslim women.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family, the number of what Your knowledge encompasses, and Your Book counts, and Your angels witness, a permanent prayer that endures with the duration of the Kingdom of Allah.

O Allah, I ask You by all Your Beautiful Names, to send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, with every prayer that has been prayed upon him from the beginning of time to its end, and to make this prayer of ours like their prayers, and our reward like their rewards, and to multiply that for us by Your bounty, O Most Generous of the generous.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Ascetic Prophet, the Messenger of the King, the Eternal, the One. May Allah bless him and grant him peace, a permanent prayer to the end of eternity, without interruption or depletion, a prayer by which You save us from the heat of Hell and the wretched resting place.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a prayer that no pray-er has prayed since the beginning of time, and a prayer that the pray-ers will pray to the end of time, like the superiority of their prayers over his prayer, and like his superiority over the rest of His creation. And send blessings upon him and upon his Family, a prayer that befits his honor and his great magnitude.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Swelling Sea, and the Dazzling Light, a prayer that fills the regions, and is for us a salvation from the Fire.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family and Companions, a prayer that has no end to its perfection, and no annihilation to its duration.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that is a proximity to You, a reward for him, and a rectification for us.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, who is the Pole of Majesty, the Sun of Prophecy and the Message, the Guide to You, and the One who takes by You to You.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Family, and make us taste the sweetness of his connection, and make us among the people of his perfection, and praise be to Allah for that.

explanation.en:
**Surah Al-Ikhlas**
1. Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One..."

**Tafsir:**
Affirmation of Allah's Oneness. Protection against everything when recited morning and evening.
O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the day Your cause Your slaves to rise.
Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but He. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.
Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him, by the multitude of His creation, by His Pleasure, by the weight of His Throne, and by the extent of His Words.
There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner. His is the Kingdom and His is the praise, and He has power over all things.
O Allah, whatever blessing has been received by me or anyone of Your creation is from You alone, You have no partner. So to You belongs all praise and all thanks.

**Surah Al-Falaq**
1. Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak..."

**Tafsir:**
Protection against evil, magic, and envy.

O Allah, grant my body health. O Allah, grant my hearing health. O Allah, grant my sight health. There is no god but You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty, and I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. There is no god but You.
In the Name of Allah, who with His Name nothing can cause harm in the earth nor in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

O Allah, I have entered the evening calling You as a witness, and calling the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all Your creation to witness that You are Allah, there is no god but You, Alone, without partner, and that Muhammad is Your slave and Your Messenger.

munajat_7.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, who is the one who has tasted the sweetness of Your love and then sought a replacement for You? Who is the one who has become intimate with Your nearness and then desired a shift away from You? O my God, so make us among those whom You have chosen for Your nearness and friendship, purified for Your affection and love, filled with longing for Your meeting, made satisfied with Your decree, granted looking at Your Face, favored with Your good pleasure, protected from Your banishment and loathing, settled in the Seat of Truthfulness in Your neighborhood, distinguished with Your knowledge, made worthy of Your worship, enamored with Your will, selected for Your witnessing, emptied his face for You, cleared his heart for Your love, made him desire what is with You, inspired him with Your remembrance, distributed to him Your thanksgiving, occupied him with obeying You, made him among the righteous of Your creation, chose him for Your intimate converse, and cut off from him everything that cuts him off from You.

O Allah, make us among those whose habit is rejoicing in You and yearning, whose time is sighing and groaning, whose foreheads are prostrating to Your Greatness, whose eyes are awake in Your service, whose tears are flowing from fear of You, whose hearts are attached to Your love, and whose cores are dislocated by awe of You. O One whose lights of holiness are clear to the eyes of His lovers, and the glories of whose Face are arousing to the hearts of His knowers. O wish of the hearts of the yearners, O goal of the hopes of the lovers. I ask You for Your love, the love of those who love You, and the love of every deed that brings me to Your nearness; and that You make Yourself more beloved to me than anything other than You, and that You make my love for You a leader to Your good pleasure, and my longing for You a driver against disobeying You. Bestow upon me looking at You, look at me with the eye of affection and kindness, do not turn Your face away from me, and make me among the people of happiness and favor with You, O Responder, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

munajat_1.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

O my God, You have settled us in a dwelling that has dug for us pits of its deception, and suspended us by the hands of death in the snares of its treachery. So to You we take refuge from the machinations of its tricks, and in You we seek protection from being deluded by the glitter of its ornaments. For it is the destroyer of those who seek it, the ruin of those who settle in it, stuffed with calamities, laden with misfortunes.

O my God, so make us ascetic towards it, and save us from it by Your tawfiq (success-granting) and protection. Strip from us the robes of disobeying You, take charge of our affairs with Your excellent sufficiency, increase our share from the vastness of Your mercy, beautify our gifts from the overflow of Your talents, plant in our hearts the trees of Your love, complete for us the lights of Your gnosis, make us taste the sweetness of Your pardon and forgiveness, fill our hearts with the coolness of Your safety and security, gladden our eyes with looking at You on the day of meeting You, and grant us true reliance upon You, good opinion of You, and trust in what is with You, so that our hope is only in You, our fear is only of You, and our humble entreaty is only to You. For You are the True, Manifest Guardian, and You are the Generous Responder.

O my God, I have no power to move away from disobeying You, nor strength to prevail over myself, except by Your protection and success-granting. So help me with Your power and strength, support me with Your victory, guard me with Your eye that does not sleep, admit me into Your impregnable fortress, and cover me with Your protective veil, for You have power over all things.

O my God, it is not simply right for one who has taken refuge in You to be disappointed, nor for one who has held fast to the handle of Your kindness to be forsaken, nor does it befit one who has sought protection in Your might to be surrendered or neglected.

O my God, do not leave us without Your protection, do not strip us of Your care, and defend us from the sources of destruction, for we are under Your eye and in Your care. I ask You by Your special ones among Your angels and the righteous among Your creation, to place upon us a protection that saves us from destructions, avoids us from calamities, and shields us from disastrous misfortunes; and to send down upon us Your tranquility, cover our faces with the lights of Your love, shelter us in Your mighty pillar, and contain us in the folds of Your protection, by Your kindness and mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

explanation.en:
**Surah Al-Falaq**
Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak..."

**Tafsir:**
Protection against evil.
O Allah, whatever blessing has been received by me or anyone of Your creation is from You alone, You have no partner. So to You belongs all praise and all thanks.
O Ever Living, O Self-Subsisting and Supporter of all, by Your mercy I seek assistance. Rectify for me all my affairs and do not leave me to myself, even for the blink of an eye.
O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.

munajat_8.main:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

Glory be to You! How narrow are the paths for one for whom You remain not his guide, and how clear is the Truth for one whom You have guided to his path.

O my God, so make us travel the paths of arriving at You, and make us journey on the nearest roads for coming to You. Bring near to us the distant, and make easy for us the difficult and severe. Join us with the servants who are hastening to You with speed, knocking constantly at Your door, worshipping You in the night, and are fearful of Your awe; those for whom You have purified the drinking places, delivered the desires, granted success to the requests, fulfilled from Your connection the aims, filled their consciences with Your love, and quenched them from Your pure drink. So by You they reached the joy of nearness, from You they obtained the rest of security, and upon You they relied in the stations of truthfulness.

O my God, this is the station of one whose aspiration is cut off to You, and whose desire is turned towards You. For You, not other than You, are my intended; and for You, not other than You, is my wakefulness and sleeplessness. Meeting You is the coolness of my eye, connection with You is the wish of my soul, to You is my longing, in Your love is my infatuation, to Your affection is my fervent desire, Your good pleasure is my aim, seeing You is my need, Your neighborhood is my request, Your nearness is the utmost of my asking, in Your intimate converse is my intimacy and rest, and with You is the medicine of my illness, the cure of my burning thirst, the coolness of my ardor, and the removal of my distress. So be my Intimate in my loneliness, the releaser of my stumble, the forgiver of my slip, the acceptor of my repentance, the responder to my call, the guardian of my protection, and the enricher of my poverty. Do not cut me off from You, and do not distance me from You, O my Bliss and my Paradise, O my World and my Hereafter.

explanation.en: We have entered the evening and at this very time the whole Kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. There is no god but Allah, the One; He has no partner. His is the Kingdom and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this night and the good of what follows it, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from laziness and senility. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from torment in the Fire and torment in the grave.

awrad_thursday.main:
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the most noble of beings, and the Master of the people of the earth and the heavens.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that befits his noble essence, and is for us a protection from violations.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family and Companions, a permanent prayer until the Day of Judgment.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, as long as the sun rises, and the five prayers are prayed, and a speaker speaks in a whisper.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, a prayer that You are worthy of, and he is worthy of.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, as he is worthy of it and deserving of it.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and reward him on our behalf with the best of what You rewarded a Prophet on behalf of his nation.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, by the number of every atom a thousand thousand times.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, a prayer that outweighs the earths and the heavens.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, filling what You have created, and the weight of Your Throne.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon the Family of our Master Muhammad, a prayer that has no interruption and no cessation.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer that is for us a store and a gift.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the number of the leaves of the trees, the waves of the seas, and the drops of the rains.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You raise our ranks, facilitate our affairs, and illuminate our lights.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You expand our chests, and bless our affairs.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which You honor his abode, and make him reach his satisfaction on the Day of Resurrection.

O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Original Prophet, the Noble Master, who came with the Revelation and the Sending Down, and clarified the explanation of interpretation.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, and upon his Family, his Companions, his Wives, his Descendants, and his Household, the best prayer and the purest peace, and the most growing blessings, in every time and moment.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, as long as the rememberers mention him, and the heedless are heedless of mentions him.

O Allah, send blessings upon the Prophet of Mercy, the Intercessor of the Nation, and the Remover of Grief.
O Allah, send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, a prayer by which we attain his intercession, and receive the favor of his company in Paradise.
